3043520.name: Project Legion Demo
3043520.description:
Welcome to the Terrifying World of Project Nightmares!


Dive into the chilling ambiance of our multiplayer horror game, where fear lurks around every corner. While our full game offers heart-pounding multiplayer experiences, this demo provides a glimpse into the spine-tingling single-player mode.

Experience the Thrill, Solo

While the full game thrives on multiplayer interactions, this demo allows players to acquaint themselves with the gameplay mechanics and atmospheric storytelling in a solo adventure. Explore the depths of terror at your own pace as you prepare for the impending multiplayer playtest.

Features:

  • Immersive Horror: Immerse yourself in a chilling atmosphere crafted to keep you on the edge of your seat.
  • Solo Mission: Embark on a solo journey through terror-filled landscapes, setting the stage for the multiplayer mayhem to come.
  • Adapt and Survive: Learn the ropes of survival horror gameplay as you prepare to face the horrors that await in the full game.

Join Us for the Playtest

Prepare to brave the horrors that await in Project Legion by experiencing the demo today. Stay tuned for updates on our upcoming multiplayer playtest, where you'll have the chance to join forces with fellow survivors or face the terror alone.
3043520.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 简体中文, 韩语, 丹麦语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 荷兰语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 瑞典语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 阿拉伯语
